comment_text:
It will be interesting to see how accurately they portray Brother Brigham. I hope they don't go easy on my people's former prophet. having dug into the true history of my mormon (LDS, Brighamite branch) religion, I can say that he embodied so much of the hate that still permiates my church. The Danites need to feature for this to be a complete story.
There is a lot of misinformation about Brigham and his leading of the church from anti-mormons making up rumors to modern whitewashed church curriculum. I hope they took the time to sift through the BS so that this work doesnt join the ranks of the former in the minds of modern LDS members. Provable misinformation strengthen's the conviction of the most fundumentalist members who preach that Brigham Young did nothing wrong.
If this show pulls it off well enough and it successful enough, we could see a rightful change of the names of our Brigham Young Universities. Having his name on my résumé should be seen as a stain.
